title: Super Mario Bros. Severe Corruption 2
description: Another f*cked up version of Super Mario Bros, but even more bizarre and unplayable! Just like the 1st SMBSC video, this one still includes the ikaaae code and the random, atrocious sound effects. I like to make videos like these, but for some reason, I just don't want to be too consistent with the corrupting videos I make. But anyways, all I can say is glitchy game genie codes are f*cking badass.. Enjoi!
